moments.title: Wimbledon Heats Up
moments.blurb: The third round of Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles is underway at Wimbledon, with the tournament running until July 12th.

angles.name: General Update
angles.copy: Third round action at Wimbledon today! Who are you backing to make it through to the next stage?

angles.name: London Focus
angles.copy: The All England Club is buzzing! Another day of incredible tennis at Wimbledon, right here in London. Who's your pick for the title?

moments.title: F1 British Grand Prix Starts
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 Pirelli British Grand Prix kicks off today at Silverstone, with Practice 1 and Sprint Qualifying on the schedule.

angles.name: Race Day Excitement
angles.copy: Lights out and away we go! The British Grand Prix weekend is officially ON at Silverstone. Who's taking pole in Sprint Qualifying today?

angles.name: Weekend Kick-off
angles.copy: The roar of F1 engines is back in the UK! Practice and Sprint Qualifying today for the British Grand Prix. What a start to the weekend!

moments.title: World Cup Round of 32 Finishes
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 32 concludes today with crucial matches, setting the stage for the Round of 16.

angles.name: Today's Deciders
angles.copy: It all comes down to today! The final Round of 32 matches at the World Cup. Who's making it through to the last 16?

angles.name: England's Next Match
angles.copy: With the Round of 32 wrapping up, England fans are looking ahead! The Three Lions face Mexico in the Round of 16 on Sunday. Predictions?

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Hold UK No. 1
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' holds the top spot on the Official Singles Chart for an impressive 15th nonconsecutive week.

angles.name: Chart Reign
angles.copy: Still reigning supreme! Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is the UK's No. 1 single for a 15th week. Incredible stuff!

angles.name: Modern Classic
angles.copy: 'Rein Me In' is fast becoming a modern classic! Huge congratulations to Sam Fender and Olivia Dean on their continued chart dominance.

moments.title: Metallica Live in London
moments.blurb: Metal legends Metallica play the first of two nights at London Stadium today as part of their M72 World Tour, with different setlists each night.

angles.name: Rock Out London
angles.copy: London Stadium is about to get LOUD! Metallica kick off their two-night stand tonight. Who's ready for some heavy metal thunder?

angles.name: No Repeat Weekend
angles.copy: Two nights, two different setlists! Metallica bring their epic 'No Repeat Weekend' to London Stadium. Which songs are you hoping to hear?

moments.title: Harry Styles Continues Wembley Residency
moments.blurb: Harry Styles performs at Wembley Stadium tonight, continuing his 'Together, Together' residency in London.

angles.name: Wembley Wonderland
angles.copy: Another night, another incredible show from Harry Styles at Wembley! Who's heading there tonight to catch the 'Together, Together' magic?

angles.name: London Loves Harry
angles.copy: The Harry Styles takeover of Wembley continues! What's your favourite moment from his 'Together, Together' residency so far?

moments.title: Shane Lynch Turns 50
moments.blurb: Boyzone's Shane Lynch celebrates his 50th birthday today!

angles.name: Boyzone Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 50th Birthday to Boyzone legend Shane Lynch! What's your favourite Boyzone track to celebrate with today?

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 50th birthday to Shane Lynch! From Boyzone heartthrob to racing driver, what an incredible career!

moments.title: Vince Clarke's 66th Birthday
moments.blurb: Synth-pop pioneer Vince Clarke, known for his work with Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, turns 66 today.

angles.name: Synth Legend
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday to the incredible Vince Clarke! A true synth-pop legend from Depeche Mode to Erasure. What's your favourite track he's produced?

angles.name: Erasure Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Vince Clarke's 66th birthday today! The man behind some of the most iconic electronic hits. Time to crank up some Erasure!

moments.title: Welsh Drama 'The Light in the Hall' Finale
moments.blurb: The second season of the gripping Welsh drama 'The Light in the Hall: Still Waters' concludes tonight on Channel 4.

angles.name: Welsh TV Must-Watch
angles.copy: Tonight's the night! The tense finale of the Welsh drama 'The Light in the Hall: Still Waters' airs on Channel 4. Have you been following the mystery?

angles.name: Local Drama Buzz
angles.copy: The gripping Welsh drama 'The Light in the Hall' wraps up its second season tonight! Perfect for a Friday night in. What are your predictions?

moments.title: Pride in London Tomorrow
moments.blurb: London will celebrate its LGBTQ+ communities with the annual Pride in London parade and festivities taking place tomorrow, Saturday July 4th.

angles.name: Get Ready for Pride
angles.copy: London is getting ready to celebrate! Pride in London takes over the capital tomorrow. Are you joining the celebrations?

angles.name: Celebrate Diversity
angles.copy: Tomorrow, London shines bright for Pride! A day of celebration, unity, and visibility for the LGBTQ+ community. Let's make some noise!

moments.title: BTS Tottenham Hotspur Stadium
moments.blurb: Global superstars BTS are set to perform at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium on Monday, July 6th, promising an immersive show for ARMY.

angles.name: ARMY Assemble!
angles.copy: Get ready, ARMY! BTS are bringing their incredible show to Tottenham Hotspur Stadium on Monday. Who's got tickets?

angles.name: Global Phenomenon
angles.copy: BTS is coming to London! Tottenham Hotspur Stadium will be electric on Monday for one of the biggest pop phenomena on Earth.

moments.title: Ashton Irwin Turns 32
moments.blurb: Ashton Irwin, drummer for 5 Seconds of Summer, celebrates his 32nd birthday on Tuesday, July 7th.

angles.name: 5SOS Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 32nd Birthday to 5 Seconds of Summer's Ashton Irwin on Tuesday! What's your favourite 5SOS anthem?

angles.name: Drummer Boy
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Ashton Irwin from 5 Seconds of Summer turns 32 on July 7th. Send him your birthday wishes!

moments.title: Courtney Love Turns 62
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter and Hole frontwoman Courtney Love celebrates her 62nd birthday on Thursday, July 9th.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the iconic Courtney Love on Thursday! What's your go-to Hole track?

angles.name: Grunge Queen
angles.copy: Celebrating the one and only Courtney Love, who turns 62 on July 9th! A true force in rock music.

moments.title: Jack White Turns 51
moments.blurb: The White Stripes, The Raconteurs, and The Dead Weather frontman Jack White celebrates his 51st birthday on Thursday, July 9th.

angles.name: Rock Architect
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the incredible Jack White on Thursday! From The White Stripes to his solo work, a true guitar hero. What's your favourite?

angles.name: White Stripes Legacy
angles.copy: Celebrating the prolific Jack White's 51st birthday this Thursday! What's your favourite era of his illustrious career?

moments.title: Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival
moments.blurb: The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival takes place in Moseley Park, Birmingham from July 10th-12th, featuring innovative UK and international acts.

source.l: Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival Official Site

angles.name: Birmingham Groove
angles.copy: Get ready Birmingham! The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival kicks off this weekend in Moseley Park. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Bringing the best in jazz, funk, and soul to Birmingham! The festival runs from July 10th-12th. Perfect summer vibes!
